title: Anthropic’s astonishing commercial success makes it a target
summary: Anthropic's rapid rise has sparked a power struggle with the Trump administration over AI regulation, national security and control of advanced models. The clash threatens its IPO, highlights gaps in AI governance, and raises a bigger question: who should control transformative AI technology?

summary: Will swarms of autonomous aerial vehicles be able to aid humans in wildland firefighting or package delivery? In this interview, Professor Julie A Adams describes the research showing that one person can supervise more than 100 autonomous […]

title: Shadow agents: find and govern unsanctioned AI agents
summary:
Teams are moving AI agents from prototype to workflow fast. One agent gets connected to a document store. Another starts calling internal tools. A third begins touching customer data.  Soon, agents are operating across systems before governance teams have a clear record of what they can access, who owns them, or what they’ve done. AI...

title: Ep. 01 – Tech Conference Roundup 2026: The Kevin Stratvert Podcast
summary:
It’s the season for the big summer tech conferences. In this episode, Kevin and Nick discuss the big takeaways from Google I/O, Microsoft Build, and WWDC. Plus, Anthropic released a powerful new AI model, Fable 5, but immediately suspended it. Hear all about Kevin’s experiences using Fable 5 before it was pulled, as well as some perspective on what it means for the larger AI ecosystem.

Hosts: Kevin Stratvert and Nick Brazzi 
#googleio , #MicrosoftBuild, #WWDC, #Anthropic, #Gemini

title: Lovable AI Tutorial for Beginners - Build Your First App
summary:
This Lovable AI tutorial for beginners shows you how to build a real app from plain English, with no code, and put it right on your phone. ❤️ Try it free and build along with me ➜ http://lovable.kevinstratvert.com 

First, you'll learn what makes a good prompt for Lovable, so the AI builds the app you actually pictured instead of guessing. 

Next, you'll turn on Plan mode and watch Lovable map out the whole app before it spends a single credit building it. Then you'll watch Lovable turn that plain-English description into a real, working app, wired up to the outside services it needs. 

Along the way, you'll refine your app with simple follow-up prompts, change the design, and add new features, all without writing code. After that, you'll add real user sign-in so other people can safely use what you built, and run Lovable's built-in security scan to catch issues before you go live. 

Then you'll publish your app to a free live link and install it on your phone as an app icon, with no app store required. By the end of this Lovable tutorial, you'll have a real, working app that you built yourself, plus the confidence to build your next one. 

Whether you're a complete beginner or just new to AI app builders, you'll go from idea to a published app in a single sitting. 

That's really all it takes, so go build your own and tell me what you make ➜ https://lovable.kevinstratvert.com 

Host: David DeWinter 
Sponsor: Lovable 

📚 RESOURCES 
❤️ Try Lovable (and follow along) ➜ https://lovable.kevinstratvert.com
